Wool Blend Overcoat

Size
S
M
L
XL
01 Description

A timeless overcoat crafted from premium Italian wool blend. The relaxed silhouette features a structured shoulder, hidden button placket, and fully lined interior for exceptional comfort and warmth.

02 Sustainability
♻
Eco Materials
Responsibly sourced wool from certified farms
🌍
Fair Production
Manufactured in GOTS-certified facilities
📦
Minimal Packaging
100% recyclable and plastic-free packaging
03 The Story

Every garment tells a story. From the rolling hills of Tuscany where our wool is sourced, to the skilled hands of our master tailors — this piece carries a heritage of craftsmanship spanning three generations.

04 Specifications
Material80% Wool, 20% Cashmere
OriginItaly
Weight450 g/m²
CareDry Clean
05 Production

Produced in limited quantities to ensure the highest standards of quality. Each piece undergoes rigorous quality control, including hand-inspection of every seam and finish before receiving its unique NFC authentication chip.
